PhaseExecutionType.description: How a phase should be executed.
PhaseExecutionType.title: PhaseExecutionType

description:
Schema for the YAML frontmatter in phase .md prompt files.

This models only the optional metadata fields that appear in phase markdown
frontmatter — NOT the full phase definition (which includes required fields
like id/name/order that come from workflow.yaml, not frontmatter).

Source of truth for schemas/plugin/phase-frontmatter.schema.json.
See ADR-053 for the schema generation strategy.

model.description: Model to use for this phase (e.g., 'sonnet', 'opus').
model.title: Model

allowed-tools.description: Tools available during this phase. Accepts a YAML list or a comma-separated string (e.g., 'bash, git, read').
allowed-tools.title: Allowed-Tools

argument-hint.description: Hint for Claude Code command argument.
argument-hint.title: Argument-Hint

title: PhaseFrontmatterSchema
